nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED until Mary configures API keys and activates. Fires hourly. Ingests from GDELT (free), NewsAPI (free 100/day), OpenWeatherMap (free 1000/day), Bank of Canada (free), Statistics Canada (free), FSRA RSS (free). Google Trends requires pytrends server or SerpAPI — placeholder only. Configure NEWSAPI_KEY + OPENWEATHER_KEY in .env and create n8n credentials 'NewsAPI' + 'OpenWeatherMap' before activating.

nodes.name: Fetch Source
nodes.notes: No credential bound at the HTTP-node level. Per-source credentials (NewsAPI, OpenWeatherMap) would be added to an appendable auth variant — for simplicity v1 sends the URL as-is. NewsAPI + OpenWeatherMap calls will fail until Mary appends &apiKey= / &appid= via URL editing OR n8n credential expression. See Normalize Payload for the error-tolerant handling.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: null, node_name: 'signal_ingestion_' + ($json.source || 'unknown'), error_code: 'SIGNAL_INGESTION_FAILED', error_message: ($json._error_msg || 'empty response') + ' (source=' + ($json.source || 'unknown') + ')', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ source: $json.source, external_id: $json.external_id, raw_payload: $json.raw_payload, raw_url: $json.raw_url || null, fetched_at: $json.fetched_at }) }}

nodes.name: Insert Raw Signal
nodes.notes: Prefer header 'resolution=ignore-duplicates' so the composite unique on (source, external_id) dedupes across hourly runs without raising an error.
